articles.title: ♠️🏆 Congratulations to Bob Barker of Perham MN the Black Chip Bounty Champion🏆♠️
articles.excerpt: What an incredible day of poker at the Black Chip Bounty Tournament! Congratulations to all of our players who battled their way to the final table and cashed in on today’s action. 🥇 Champion – Bob Baker (Perham, MN) 💰 $3,100 (Modified Chop…
articles.content: What an incredible day of poker at the Black Chip Bounty Tournament! Congratulations to all of our players who battled their way to the final table and cashed in on today’s action. 🥇 Champion – Bob Baker (Perham, MN) 💰 $3,100 (Modified Chop) 🎯 $600 in Bounties 🏆 Trophy Winner 🥈 Bryan Thompson (Fargo, ND) 💰 $3,800 (Modified Chop) 🎯 $1,100 in Bounties 🥉 Chase Lardy (Fargo, ND) 💰 $2,000 🎯 $400 in Bounties 4️⃣ Lee Cavanagh (Hickson, ND) 💰 $1,300 🎯 $500 in Bounties 5️⃣ Mike Anderson (Detroit Lakes, MN) 💰 $1,100 🎯 $600 in Bounties 6️⃣ Jeremy Holmes (West Fargo, ND) 💰 $860 🎯 $200 in Bounties 7️⃣ John Joseph (Doran, MN) 💰 $660 🎯 $1,000 in Bounties 8️⃣ John Elledge (Fargo, ND) 💰 $500 🎯 $100 in Bounties 9️⃣ Keith Johnson (Moorhead, MN) 💰 $500 🔟 Casey Olson (Jamestown, ND) 💰 $320 🎯 $200 in Bounties 1️⃣1️⃣ T-Mack (Moorhead, MN) 💰 $320 🎯 $300 in Bounties 1️⃣2️⃣ Todd Egerdahl (Fargo, ND) 💰 $320 🎯 $200 in Bounties A huge thank you to everyone who came out to support the event, our volunteer dealers, staff, and all of the players who made this tournament another great success. DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Final Table of the Black Chip Bounty
articles.excerpt: 🏆 Congratulations to Our Final Table! 🏆 After an incredible turnout of 97 players, we have officially reached the Final Table! Today’s event generated a total prize pool of $24,480, with $9,700 paid out in bounties and $14,780 awarded to th…
articles.content: 🏆 Congratulations to Our Final Table! 🏆 After an incredible turnout of 97 players, we have officially reached the Final Table! Today’s event generated a total prize pool of $24,480, with $9,700 paid out in bounties and $14,780 awarded to the Top 12 finishers. A huge thank you to everyone who came out to support our Charity Partner, PPA, and the Dakota Poker Tour. The support from our players continues to make these events a tremendous success. Good luck to our final table players as they battle for the title and the top prize! ♠️♥️♦️♣️

articles.title: Registration closed in the black Chip bounty with 97 players
articles.excerpt: 🚨 REGISTRATION IS CLOSED! 🚨 What an incredible turnout today! We officially closed registration with 97 players, generating a total prize pool of $24,480! 💰 $9,700 will be paid out in bounties 💰 $14,780 will be paid out to the Top 12 finish…
articles.content: 🚨 REGISTRATION IS CLOSED! 🚨 What an incredible turnout today! We officially closed registration with 97 players, generating a total prize pool of $24,480! 💰 $9,700 will be paid out in bounties 💰 $14,780 will be paid out to the Top 12 finishers Thank you to everyone who came out to support our amazing Charity Partner, NPPA, and the Dakota Poker Tour. Your participation helps make these events possible and continues to grow the game we all love. A special thank you to Randy Dinner for providing a delicious lunch for our players and staff today. It was greatly appreciated! And, as always, a huge shoutout to our incredible volunteer dealers. Without your time, dedication, and hard work, events like this simply would not be possible. We can’t thank you enough for everything you do. Good luck to all the remaining players as they battle it out for the title, cash, and bounties! ♠️♥️♦️♣️🏆💰 DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: 8 Tables in the Windbreak Black Chip Bounty
articles.excerpt: ♠️ CARDS ARE IN THE AIR! ♠️ The Dakota Poker Tour Bounty Tournament is officially underway at the Windbreak! We’ve got 8 tables in action and still plenty of room to grow. If you’re thinking about playing, there’s still time to join us! ⏰ L…
articles.content: ♠️ CARDS ARE IN THE AIR! ♠️ The Dakota Poker Tour Bounty Tournament is officially underway at the Windbreak! We’ve got 8 tables in action and still plenty of room to grow. If you’re thinking about playing, there’s still time to join us! ⏰ Late registration remains open until approximately 5:00 PM. 💰 $100 bounty on every player you eliminate 🔥 Great action, great food, and a great atmosphere Get down to the Windbreak and take your shot at the prize pool and those bounties! See you at the tables! ♣️♦️♥️♠️ DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Dakota Poker Tour has Arrived at the Windbreak
articles.excerpt: ♠️♦️ ATTENTION POKER FRIENDS! ♦️♠️ The Dakota Poker Tour has officially arrived and is all set up at the Windbreak! Get ready for an action-packed day of poker with our ONE-DAY BOUNTY TOURNAMENT! 💰🔥 🕚 Registration Opens: 11:00 AM 🃏 Cards in…
articles.content: ♠️♦️ ATTENTION POKER FRIENDS! ♦️♠️ The Dakota Poker Tour has officially arrived and is all set up at the Windbreak! Get ready for an action-packed day of poker with our ONE-DAY BOUNTY TOURNAMENT! 💰🔥 🕚 Registration Opens: 11:00 AM 🃏 Cards in the Air: NOON 💵 Buy-In: $200 = 20,000 Chips ➕ One-Time Add-On: $100 = 20,000 Chips (Add-on available until registration closes. Must have chips to add on.) 🎯 $100 BOUNTY FOR EVERY PLAYER YOU ELIMINATE! Late registration and add-ons remain open through the dinner break (approximately 5 PM) 👏 Suggested Dealer Appreciation: $20 Tips are appreciated but never required to play. 🍽️ Come hungry! Randy’s Diner will be serving up a delicious Philly Cheesesteak Bar during the dinner break. Bring some cash and treat yourself while battling for bounties and big prizes! Grab your friends, bring your A-game, and we’ll see you at the tables at the Windbreak today! ♠️♥️♣️♦️ #DakotaPokerTour #DPTPoker #BountyTournament #WindbreakPoker #PokerLife #Cards DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Dakota Poker Tour Spring Championship winner, Eric Kassa of Wahpeton, North Dakota! 🏆♠️
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to the Dakota Poker Tour Spring Championship winner, Eric Kassa of Wahpeton, North Dakota! 🏆♠️ Eric battled through a tough field to take home $8,000 and the coveted Spring Championship trophy! 🔥 This is another huge accompl…
articles.content: Congratulations to the Dakota Poker Tour Spring Championship winner, Eric Kassa of Wahpeton, North Dakota! 🏆♠️ Eric battled through a tough field to take home $8,000 and the coveted Spring Championship trophy! 🔥 This is another huge accomplishment for Eric, who also captured the High Roller Championship at the Free Poker Network National Championship this past January in Las Vegas! A very special thank you as well to Heidi Roggenkamp, owner of Randy’s Diner, for generously providing breakfast and lunch for our hardworking dealers today. Your support is truly appreciated! ❤️ And of course, thank you to all of our amazing volunteer dealers. Events like this would not be possible without your dedication, long hours, and love for the game. We can’t thank you enough! Huge shoutout as well to our tech team for bringing everyone the live stream feature table experience all weekend long! Jerod, Tony, Brian, and the silky smooth Chris Hanson! 🎥♠️ You guys helped make this event truly special for players and viewers everywhere. Thank you to everyone who came out this weekend to support the Dakota Poker Tour and the West Fargo Rural Fire Department. What an incredible championship weekend! ♦️♣️ DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Black Chip Bounty Champion, Jason McClellan of Perham, Minnesota! 🏆♠️
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to our Black Chip Bounty Champion, Jason McClellan of Perham, Minnesota! 🏆♠️ Jason battled through a tough field of 61 players to take home $2,300 for the victory, along with an impressive $700 in bounties! 💰🔥 That officiall…
articles.content: Congratulations to our Black Chip Bounty Champion, Jason McClellan of Perham, Minnesota! 🏆♠️ Jason battled through a tough field of 61 players to take home $2,300 for the victory, along with an impressive $700 in bounties! 💰🔥 That officially wraps up an incredible Dakota Poker Tour Spring Championship weekend at the DoubleTree in West Fargo. Thank you to every player, volunteer dealer, staff member, charity partner, and supporter who made this event such a huge success. We appreciate everyone who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and the West Fargo Rural Fire Department. From the Friday Night Turbo, to the 100K MEGASTACK, to today’s bounty action — the energy all weekend long was absolutely amazing. We’ll see you all at the next stop on the Dakota Poker Tour! ♠️♦️♣️♥️ DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: FINAL TABLE in the Black Chip Bounty Tournament! 💰♠️🔥
articles.excerpt: We have officially reached the FINAL TABLE in the Black Chip Bounty Tournament! 💰♠️🔥 After an action-packed day with 61 players generating a prize pool of over $15,000, we are now down to the final competitors battling for the title and the…
articles.content: We have officially reached the FINAL TABLE in the Black Chip Bounty Tournament! 💰♠️🔥 After an action-packed day with 61 players generating a prize pool of over $15,000, we are now down to the final competitors battling for the title and the cash! 💵 Payouts have officially begun 🏆 Top 7 players are taking home money today 💥 Bounties are still in play and every knockout matters! Good luck to everyone still fighting for the championship! DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour Jeremy Thury Jamestown ND Jason Miller Detroit Lakes MN Brendon Sandy Warroad MN Travis Lynde Lake Park MN Josh Matti Dilworth MN Jason McClellan Perham MN Luke DeWulf Fargo ND

articles.title: Final table of the Spring Championship
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to everyone who made the final table of the Dakota Poker Tour Spring Championship! ♠️♦️♣️♥️ Out of an incredible field of 134 players, these final competitors have battled their way down to the last table and are now chasing…
articles.content: Congratulations to everyone who made the final table of the Dakota Poker Tour Spring Championship! ♠️♦️♣️♥️ Out of an incredible field of 134 players, these final competitors have battled their way down to the last table and are now chasing their share of the $32,000 prize pool along with the Spring Championship title! Thank you to all the players who came out this weekend to support the Dakota Poker Tour, the West Fargo Fire Department, and our amazing volunteer dealers who help make these events possible. DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour Phu Truong 1,355,000 Steve Zima 755,000 Josh Lanzdorf 1,925,000 Eric Kassa 2,700,000 Tony Uhlir 650,000 Jackson Skjerseth 2,050,000 Mike Anderson 1,920,000 Brad Magnus 440,000 Steve Belland 1,700,000

articles.title: Registration has officially CLOSED in today’s Black Chip Bounty Tournament! 💰♠️
articles.excerpt: A huge thank you to the 61 players who came out today, generating a Sunday prize pool of over $15,000! 🔥 The action is heating up as players battle it out for the title, with the top 7 players taking home cash today — plus those bounty payo…
articles.content: A huge thank you to the 61 players who came out today, generating a Sunday prize pool of over $15,000! 🔥 The action is heating up as players battle it out for the title, with the top 7 players taking home cash today — plus those bounty payouts adding even more excitement along the way! Good luck to everyone still in the hunt! Cards are in the air and the bounty chips are flying! ♦️

articles.title: 💰 The Black Chip Bounty Tournament is officially underway
articles.excerpt: 💰 The Black Chip Bounty Tournament is officially underway with 5 tables of action and players still rolling in! 💥♠️ Late registration is open until 5 PM, so there’s still plenty of time to get in the game and start collecting bounties! 🔥 $1…
articles.content: 💰 The Black Chip Bounty Tournament is officially underway with 5 tables of action and players still rolling in! 💥♠️ Late registration is open until 5 PM, so there’s still plenty of time to get in the game and start collecting bounties! 🔥 $100 bounty for every player you eliminate 🃏 $200 Buy-in – 20,000 starting chips ➕ Optional $100 add-on for 20,000 chips Get down here, grab a seat, and enjoy all the action at the Dakota Poker Tour Spring Championship weekend! articles.title: Congratulations to Clint Otto of Jamestown ND Casselton Vets Champion
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to Clint Otto of Jamestown ND on taking down the Casselton Vets Deep Stack and earning $5,300 after a modified chop! 👏 What an incredible turnout. 80 players packed the room, building a $18,960 prize pool and raising an amaz…
articles.content: Congratulations to Clint Otto of Jamestown ND on taking down the Casselton Vets Deep Stack and earning $5,300 after a modified chop! 👏 What an incredible turnout. 80 players packed the room, building a $18,960 prize pool and raising an amazing $4,700 for the Casselton Vets Club. This is what it’s all about… great poker, great people, and giving back. 🇺🇸 Huge thank you to all the players who came out to support, and to our volunteer dealers, we truly couldn’t do this without you. Special shoutout to Heidi S Roggenkamp owner of Randy’s Diner and a longtime supporter, for generously providing dinner for all the dealers. And to the Vets Club for taking care of our veterans with dinner, class all the way. ❤️ 📅 Save the Date: DPT Spring Championship – May 15–17 $300 Buy-in | 100K Starting Stack | 40-Minute Levels 🎥 Official LIVE STREAM Final Table 🏆 Final Results: 1st – $5,300 Clint Otto Jamestown, ND 2nd – $3,760 Michael Headland Jamestown ND 3rd – $2,760 Holden Kastet Jamestown, ND 4th – $1,900 Dirk Gerdes West Fargo, ND 5th – $1,520 Wade Kyser Erie, ND 6th – $1,280 Kim Rasmussen Forman, ND 7th – $1,040 Adam Landerth Grand Forks, ND 8th – $800 Marcy Schultz Grand Forks, ND 9th – $600 Scott Vance Casselton, ND Who’s ready to run it back in May? ♠️♦️♣️♥️ DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: John Wendlick of Dickinson, ND Is the Buckskin Shootout Champion
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to our Buckskin Shootout Deep Stack Champion! 🏆 John Wendlick of Dickinson, ND battled through a tough field of 56 players to take down the title and $4,200 in cash! What a run! Here’s a look at our final table payouts: 1st…
articles.content: Congratulations to our Buckskin Shootout Deep Stack Champion! 🏆 John Wendlick of Dickinson, ND battled through a tough field of 56 players to take down the title and $4,200 in cash! What a run! Here’s a look at our final table payouts: 1st – $4,200 John Wendlick (Dickinson, ND) 2nd – $2,700 Kelly Allmendinger (Dodge, ND) 3rd – $2,000 Placido Sotelo (Dunn Center, ND) 4th – $1,400 Lester Hauglid (Detroit Lakes, MN) 5th – $1,150 James Lonenz (Dunn Center, ND) 6th – $950 Niles Short (Minnewaukan, ND) 7th – $800 Andrew Dertinger (New York Mills, MN) 8th – $600 Bryce Shypkoski (Dickinson, ND) 9th – $465 Jeff Parker (Dickinson, ND) Thank you to all the players who came out and made this event such a great success, we appreciate the continued support of the Dakota Poker Tour! A huge thank you to our host venue, the Buckskin Saloon, for the hospitality, and to our incredible charity partner, Ezra Barrows Post 46 American Legion, for everything they do, taking only the state minimum 10% and giving the maximum back to the players. We also want to give a special shoutout to our amazing dealers. These events simply don’t happen without you. Your time, energy, and professionalism are what keep everything running smoothly. And thank you to First International Bank & Trust for your support and helping take care of the players throughout the event. They provided (2) drinks of choice to every player and lunch! Another great stop in the books—who’s ready for the next one? ♠️♦️♣️♥️ DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT Youtube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.content: Cards are in the air for the Friday Night Turbo! We’re starting strong with 4 tables and room to grow, get down here and jump in the action! Late registration is open until 8:20 PM MT, so there’s still time to grab a seat and run it up. Come out and support the Dakota Poker Tour, our host venue Buckskin Saloon, and our charity partner, Ezra Barrows Post 46 American Legion, who is once again taking the state minimum 10%, giving the maximum back to the players. Last year’s Friday Night Turbo winner David Golombowski took home $2,200 Friday Night Turbo – Friday, March 27, 2026 Registration opened at 5 PM Cards in the air at 6 PM 20-minute blinds Late registration until 8:20 PM MT $100 buy-in for 15,000 chips $100 re-buys/add-on for 15,000 chips until close of registration Suggested dealer appreciation $20 – tips are appreciated but not mandatory to play DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.content: 🚨 Dakota Poker Tour is headed to Tioga, North Dakota! 🚨 The DPT has officially arrived at Pour Decisions, and we’re ready to shuffle up for an action-packed Deep Stack event! Who’s ready to run deep and take it down in Tioga? 👀 ♠️♦️♣️♥️ Saturday Deep Stack – March 21, 2026 • Registration opens at 11 AM • Cards in the air at NOON Tournament Details: • $150 Buy-in – 20,000 starting chips • 30-minute levels • $50 Add-on for 10,000 chips (up to 3 times) • Max buy-in: $300 • Add-ons can be taken anytime (including at the start) and used for re-entry • Late registration, re-entry, and add-ons open through dinner break (~5 PM) • Suggested dealer appreciation $20 (tips appreciated, not required) 💥 Plenty of play, plenty of chips, and plenty of chances to build a stack! articles.title: Kyle McGarry of Glyndon, ND our L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc Monster Stack Champion
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to Kyle McGarry of Glyndon, ND our L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc Monster Stack Champion at the Canad Inn in Grand Forks! Kyle outlasted a field of 77 players to take home the title, trophy, and $5,800 in CASH from a $19,640 prize pool. I…
articles.content: Congratulations to Kyle McGarry of Glyndon, ND our L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc Monster Stack Champion at the Canad Inn in Grand Forks! Kyle outlasted a field of 77 players to take home the title, trophy, and $5,800 in CASH from a $19,640 prize pool. It was a great day of poker with players battling through deep stacks and tough competition to reach the final table. We want to give a huge thank you to all the players who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and made this another fantastic event. A special thank you to our charity partner, L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc, for working with us to make this tournament possible, and to the Canad Inn in Grand Forks for hosting us and providing a great venue for the event. Thank you to Ms. Lillie from L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc for handling registration and greeting players throughout the day with a welcoming smile. And of course, a massive thank you to all of our volunteer dealers. Your time, effort, and dedication keep these tournaments running smoothly, we truly could not do it without you. Congratulations again to Kyle McGarry, our Monster Stack Champion! 🏆♠️♦️♣️♥️ 2nd $3700 Basim Habib Moorhead MN 3rd $2740 Leslie Haagenson Leeds ND 4th $1960 Ron Miller Avon MN 5th $1600 Bruce Kulseth Thompson ND 6th $1300 Cheezin Chase Lardy Fargo ND 7th $1060 Robert Kessel Grand Forks ND 8th $840 Zach Gronsberg East Grand Forks MN 9th $650 Jeremy Johnson Grandforks ND DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Congratulations to our final table at the L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc Monster Stack
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to our final table at the L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc Monster Stack here at the Canad Inn in Grand Forks, ND! Out of 77 players who came out to compete, these final 9 have battled their way through the field and secured a spot at the f…
articles.content: Congratulations to our final table at the L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc Monster Stack here at the Canad Inn in Grand Forks, ND! Out of 77 players who came out to compete, these final 9 have battled their way through the field and secured a spot at the final table. With a $19,640 prize pool on the line and $5,800 up top, the pressure is on as these players now fight for the Monster Stack Champion title and trophy. All nine players remaining are guaranteed a cash payout, but only one will walk away with the top prize. Best of luck to our final table as they battle it out! Let’s see who will be crowned the Dakota Poker Tour Monster Stack Champion tonight. ♠️♦️♣️♥️🏆 DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Monster Stack Draws 77 Players in Grand Forks
articles.excerpt: Thank you to everyone who came out to the L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc Monster Stack at the Canad Inn in Grand Forks! We had an incredible turnout with 77 players, generating a prize pool of $19,640. Tonight’s champion will be taking home a sweet troph…
articles.content: Thank you to everyone who came out to the L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc Monster Stack at the Canad Inn in Grand Forks! We had an incredible turnout with 77 players, generating a prize pool of $19,640. Tonight’s champion will be taking home a sweet trophy, the title of Monster Stack Champion, and $5,800 in CASH! The top 9 players will all be walking away with a payday today. We also want to send a huge thank you to all of our volunteer dealers, without you, these tournaments would not be possible. Your time and dedication help make these events run smoothly and we truly appreciate it. A special thank you to Ms Lillie at the registration desk, greeting all the players with a big smile and making everyone feel welcome as they arrived. Again, thank you to all the players who continue to support the Dakota Poker Tour, our charity partner L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc, and all the new friends we made along the way. We truly appreciate everyone who came out to make this another great event. DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Cole Johnson of Grand Forks, ND Friday Night Turbo Champion
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to Cole Johnson of Grand Forks, North Dakota, who captured the title in the Friday Night Turbo at the L.I.S.T.E.N. INC Monster Stack weekend at the Canad Inn! In an incredible story, Cole outlasted a field of 61 players with…
articles.content: Congratulations to Cole Johnson of Grand Forks, North Dakota, who captured the title in the Friday Night Turbo at the L.I.S.T.E.N. INC Monster Stack weekend at the Canad Inn! In an incredible story, Cole outlasted a field of 61 players with 84 rebuys/add-ons, generating a $12,150 prize pool, and took home $3,600 in cash for the victory. Even more impressive, this was Cole’s very first live poker tournament! Talk about making a debut in style. Thank you to everyone who came out to support the event and L.I.S.T.E.N. INC. We appreciate all the players who traveled to Grand Forks and made the night a huge success. We’ll see everyone back tomorrow for the Monster Stack — cards in the air at 11 AM! Who’s going to be the next champion? 2nd $2200 Rob Urbatsch Grand Forks ND 3rd $1800 Mark Britton Mapleton ND 4th $1300 Carlos Vallee Tomasini 5th $1100 Ron James West Fargo ND 6th $900 Anthony Hendricks Thief River Falls MN 7th $700 Jon Wurden Fisher MN 8th $550 Eric McPherson Shelly MN DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.content: We have reached the final table here at the Friday Night Turbo at the Canad Inn in Grand Forks! Tonight’s event brought out a strong field of 61 players, with 84 rebuys and add-ons, generating an impressive $12,150 prize pool. Not bad for a Friday night! First place will take home $3,600 in CASH, with the top 8 players all getting paid. Thank you to all the players who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and our charity partner, LISTEN Inc. We appreciate everyone who continues to make these events such a success. We’ll see everyone back tomorrow for the main event of the weekend: Saturday – L.I.S.T.E.N. INC Monster Stack NEW START TIME: 11 AM $300 Buy-in One-Day Monster Stack Event 100,000 starting chips | 30-minute levels Late registration available until 6 PM after the dinner break Suggested dealer appreciation $20 (tips appreciated but not required) Last year’s Saturday Monster Stack Champion – Sara Weishaar – $6,000 Come out, shuffle up, and see who runs deep in Grand Forks! articles.title: Congratulations Ron James the Hole in One Champion
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to Ron James of Mapleton, North Dakota, your Hole In One Champion! Ron outlasted a field of 93 players to take home $7,000 in cash after a great day of poker and competition. A huge thank you to the Angry Beaver Lodge in Oak…
articles.content: Congratulations to Ron James of Mapleton, North Dakota, your Hole In One Champion! Ron outlasted a field of 93 players to take home $7,000 in cash after a great day of poker and competition. A huge thank you to the Angry Beaver Lodge in Oakes, North Dakota for hosting another outstanding event. We also extend our appreciation to the Hole In One Foundation for generously taking only the state minimum and returning the maximum prize pool back to the players. Your continued support of both the community and the poker players does not go unnoticed. It was great seeing so many familiar faces and welcoming new players to the felt. Competitors traveled from across North Dakota, Minnesota, and South Dakota to support this event and the Hole In One mission. We’ll see everyone at our next stop March 13–14 for the L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc Monster Stack in Grand Forks, ND. Final Payouts: 1st – $7,000 Ron James – Mapleton, ND 2nd – $4,400 Lester Hauglid – Detroit Lakes, ND 3rd – $3,200 Cordell Schroeder – Carrington, ND 4th – $2,100 Stakovic Zlatko – Oakes, ND 5th – $1,700 Kristine McFarland – Gwinner, ND 6th – $1,300 Carin Kassa – Wahpeton, ND 7th – $1,100 Roger McLaen – Forman, ND 8th – $800 Don Eagen – Perham, MN 9th – $650 Robin Green – Groton, SD 10th – $550 Leroy Turner – Wolverton, MN 11th – $550 Matt Johnson – Fargo, ND 12th – $550 Serhill Hrysko – Moorhead, MN Stay connected with Dakota Poker Tour: DPT Leaderboard: dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: youtube.com/@dakotapokertour Thank you again to everyone who came out and supported a great cause. See you in Grand Forks! ♠️

articles.title: Final Table Oakes ND
articles.excerpt: After a full day of great poker and tough competition, congratulations to your official Final Table: Don Eagen Ron James Roger McLean Kristine McFarland Robin Green Carin Kassa Cordell Schroeder Stankovic Zlatko Lester Hauglid Outlasting a…
articles.content: After a full day of great poker and tough competition, congratulations to your official Final Table: Don Eagen Ron James Roger McLean Kristine McFarland Robin Green Carin Kassa Cordell Schroeder Stankovic Zlatko Lester Hauglid Outlasting a strong field and earning a seat at the final table is something to be proud of. Thank you all for bringing the energy, the competition, and for supporting an event that gives back to our local community. A special thank you to all the familiar faces who continue to show up and support the Hole In One Foundation year after year. And to all the new faces — we hope to see you again soon! We truly appreciate the players who traveled from near and far, from Minnesota, South Dakota, and across North Dakota to be part of this event. We appreciate each and every one of you. Oakes showed up in a big way. ♠️🔥 📊 DPT Leaderboard: dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard 📅 DPT Calendar: dakotapokertour.com/calendar 🎥 DPT YouTube Channel: youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Oakes Delivers: $24K Prize Pool and $7,000 to the Champion
articles.excerpt: Huge thank you to everyone who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and The Hole in One Foundation today in Oakes! Registration officially closed with 93 players, generating an incredible $24,000 prize pool. 🙌 Tonight’s champion is tak…
articles.content: Huge thank you to everyone who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and The Hole in One Foundation today in Oakes! Registration officially closed with 93 players, generating an incredible $24,000 prize pool. 🙌 Tonight’s champion is taking home $7,000, with the top 12 players all earning cash. What a day! As tradition holds, the Hole in One Foundation kept the state minimum 10%, giving the maximum payout back to the players — and that’s something we’re proud to be part of every time. The Hole in One Foundation is a Christian-based organization that gives back directly to our local community — helping friends, families, and neighbors facing financial hardship after major life-changing events. Funds are raised through poker, charitable gaming, and their annual golf scramble, and today you all helped make a difference. ❤️ Thank you for showing up, competing hard, and supporting something bigger than the game. Stay connected with DPT: DPT Leaderboard: dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: youtube.com/@dakotapokertour We’ll see you at the next stop. ♠️🔥

articles.title: Poker Players Showing up in Oakes
articles.excerpt: Poker players… where are you?! 👀 We’re already 8 tables strong and players are STILL entering here in Oakes! Don’t miss your shot — late registration is open until the 5PM dinner break. Last year’s champion walked away with $7,000 💰 Who’s m…
articles.content: Poker players… where are you?! 👀 We’re already 8 tables strong and players are STILL entering here in Oakes! Don’t miss your shot — late registration is open until the 5PM dinner break. Last year’s champion walked away with $7,000 💰 Who’s making a run at it today? 🔥 Rumor has it the chef whipped up pulled pork and cheddar mash for just $15 — come hungry and ready to play! Supporting a Great Cause ❤️ Today’s event benefits the Hole in One Foundation, a Christian-based organization that gives back directly to our local community — helping friends, families, and neighbors facing financial hardship after major life-changing events. They raise funds through poker, charitable gaming, and their annual golf scramble — and today they’re keeping the state minimum, giving the MAX prize pool back to the players! Come out and support an incredible cause, and our BFF Cody Slusher, who proudly serves on the board. ❤️ 🗓 Saturday 2/28/2026 – Single Day Event 🕚 Registration: 11AM 🕛 Cards in the Air: NOON 💰 $150 Buy-In – 20,000 Chips ⏱ 30-Minute Levels ➕ $50 Add-On = 10,000 Chips (up to 3 times – $300 max) ♻️ Add-ons available at start, during play, and for re-entry 🕔 Late Registration, Re-Entry & Add-Ons open until dinner break (~5PM) Suggested dealer appreciation: $20 (always appreciated, never required). Oakes… let’s GO! ♠️🔥

articles.title: 🏆 “Dirty” Dave Ledeman is the Buffalo City Showdown Champion
articles.excerpt: 🏆 “Dirty” Dave Ledeman of Dickinson, ND is your Buffalo City Showdown Champion! 🏆 The final three players — Dave, Tom, and Tim agreed to a deal to split the remaining prize pool, capping off an exciting day of poker. The Dakota Poker Tour d…
articles.content: 🏆 “Dirty” Dave Ledeman of Dickinson, ND is your Buffalo City Showdown Champion! 🏆 The final three players — Dave, Tom, and Tim agreed to a deal to split the remaining prize pool, capping off an exciting day of poker. The Dakota Poker Tour dealers would also like to extend a huge thank-you to all of the players for their extra generosity — it truly means a lot. Thank you to everyone who came out to support Progress Enterprise, our host The Buff Bar, and their incredible staff for taking such great care of the players all day long. A special thank-you to the UJ Women’s D2 Hockey team for providing an excellent lunch of ￼ Knoephla soup and deer sausage — nothing but compliments all around! Extra thanks to Missy and Tom for all of the behind-the-scenes work that helped make this a great event for both players and staff. 📅 Next Stop: February 28th — Hole in One Tournament 📍 Oakes, North Dakota We’ll see everyone there! ♠️🎉 1st $3400 “Dirty” Dave Ledemam Dickinson ND 2nd $3400 Timothy Kutz Jamestown ND 3rd $3400Tom Soulis Jamestown ND 4th $1800 Larry Loose Jamestown ND 5th $1400 Niles Short Minnewaukan ND 6th $1200 Wade Schlecht StreeterND 7th $900 Mark Britton Mapleton ND 8th $700 Jackson Skjerseth Moorhead MN 9th Bubble - Basim Habib Moorhead MN 📊 DPT Leaderboard: dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard 📅 DPT Calendar: dakotapokertour.com/calendar 🎥 DPT YouTube Channel: youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: 🏆 John Christiansen Wins the Dead Money Open
articles.excerpt: 🎉 Congratulations to our Dead Money Open Champion! 🎉 Congratulations to John Christiansen of Castleton, North Dakota, who battled through an impressive field of 85 players to take down the Dead Money Open and walk away with $6,500! 💰♠️ The…
articles.content: 🎉 Congratulations to our Dead Money Open Champion! 🎉 Congratulations to John Christiansen of Castleton, North Dakota, who battled through an impressive field of 85 players to take down the Dead Money Open and walk away with $6,500! 💰♠️ The tournament generated a prize pool of over $22,000, thanks to an amazing turnout and incredible support for the Dakota Poker Tour and West Fargo Hockey. Thank you to West Fargo Hockey for their generosity in taking only the state-minimum 10%, ensuring maximum payouts back to the players, we truly appreciate your support of the poker community. We also want to thank our host, the M&J Saloon, and a special shoutout to Dee and her entire staff for taking such great care of our players all day long. And of course, thank you to our hardworking dealers — we couldn’t do this without you! 🏆 Final Table Payouts 1st – $6,500 – John Christiansen (Castleton, ND) 2nd – $4,100 – Basim Habib (Moorhead, MN) 3rd – $3,000 – Vu Truong (TX) 4th – $2,100 – Ryan Belen 5th – $1,640 – Anthony Sinnen (Moorhead, MN) 6th – $1,400 – Mike Schultz (Grand Forks, ND) 7th – $1,200 – Christopher Franck (Fargo, ND) 8th – $900 – Christopher Pierce (Fargo, ND) 9th – $700 – Serhii Hryshko (Moorhead, MN) 10th – $600 – Cash Mitchell (Fargo, ND) We’ll see everybody next Saturday, February 7, for the Buffalo City Showdown at The Buff Bar in Jamestown, North Dakota! ♠️🔥 📊 DPT Leaderboard: dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard 📅 DPT Calendar: dakotapokertour.com/calendar 🎥 DPT YouTube Channel: youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Dead Money Open Generates Over $22,000 Prize Pool
articles.excerpt: Registration has officially closed at the Dead Money Open at the M&J Saloon in West Fargo, North Dakota. An incredible 85 players came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and West Fargo Hockey, generating a prize pool of over $22,000. West…
articles.content: Registration has officially closed at the Dead Money Open at the M&J Saloon in West Fargo, North Dakota. An incredible 85 players came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and West Fargo Hockey, generating a prize pool of over $22,000. West Fargo Hockey wanted to truly give back to the players, withholding only 10%, resulting in a maximum payout returned to the field — thank you for that generosity! Payouts: 1st – $6,500 2nd – $4,100 3rd – $3,000 4th – $2,100 5th – $1,640 6th – $1,400 7th – $1,200 8th – $900 9th – $700 10th – $600 A huge thank you to Dee and the entire staff at the M&J Saloon for making our players feel welcome and taking care of everything we needed — we truly appreciate you. And of course, thank you to all of our dealers who came out, worked tirelessly, and gave it their all to help put on another fantastic tournament. We couldn’t do this without you. 📊 DPT Leaderboard: dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard 📅 DPT Calendar: dakotapokertour.com/calendar 🎥 DPT YouTube Channel: youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Dead Money Open Kicks Off Strong at M&J Saloon in West Farg
articles.excerpt: We are off to a strong start at the Dead Money Open at the M&J Saloon in West Fargo! We currently have six full tables and room to grow, so get yourself down here — it’s shaping up to be a great turnout. Last year’s winner took home over $6…
articles.content: We are off to a strong start at the Dead Money Open at the M&J Saloon in West Fargo! We currently have six full tables and room to grow, so get yourself down here — it’s shaping up to be a great turnout. Last year’s winner took home over $6,000. Who’s going to make the run this time? Saturday Main Event – January 31, 2026 Registration opens at 11:00 AM Cards in the air at NOON Late registration until 5pm $150 buy-in gets you 20,000 chips with 30-minute blind levels $50 add-on for 10,000 additional chips (up to 3 times) Max buy-in of $300 for 50,000 chips Add-ons can be taken at any time, including at the start, and may be used for re-entries Late registration, re-entry, and add-ons remain open through the dinner break (approximately 5:00 PM) Suggested dealer appreciation is $20 — tips are appreciated but never required to play. Stay connected: DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Vu Truong & Randall Smith Chop the Friday Night Dead Money Turbo
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to Vu Truong and Randall Smith, who chopped first place in Friday night’s Dead Money Turbo each taking home $2050 Cash! A total of 52 players came out for the Friday Night Turbo, generating a $9,200 prize pool. Thank you to…
articles.content: Congratulations to Vu Truong and Randall Smith, who chopped first place in Friday night’s Dead Money Turbo each taking home $2050 Cash! A total of 52 players came out for the Friday Night Turbo, generating a $9,200 prize pool. Thank you to everyone who showed up to support the Dakota Poker Tour and West Fargo Hockey, we truly appreciate it! Don’t forget, tomorrow’s Main Event kicks off with: • Registration starting at 11:00 AM • Cards in the air at 12:00 PM • $150 buy-in for 20,000 chips • For every additional $50, receive 10,000 more chips • $300 max buy-in for 50,000 chips • 30-minute blind levels Last year’s winner walked away with over $6,000. Will you be the next champion? Final Results – Friday Night Turbo 1st $2,050 Randall Smith – Mahnomen, MN 1st $2,050 Vu Truong – Fort Worth, TX 3rd $1,500 Lester Hauglid – Detroit Lakes, MN 4th $1,200 Keith Johnson – Moorhead, MN 5th – $950 Richard Lugert – Lidgerwood,ND 6th – $800 Mark Britton – Mapleton, ND 7th – $650 Ethan Hongess – West Fargo,ND See everyone tomorrow — let’s make it another big one! ♠️🔥

articles.title: Dakota Poker Tour has arrived at M&J Saloon in West Fargo

articles.title: Wade Kyser of Erie, ND is your Eagle Eye Champion! 🏆♠️
articles.excerpt: Wade Kyser of Erie, ND is your Eagle Eye Champion! 🏆♠️ Wade is a long-time supporter of the Dakota Poker Tour, and tonight he claimed victory in a big way, battling through 63 players and taking down one stacked final table! This final tabl…
articles.content: Wade Kyser of Erie, ND is your Eagle Eye Champion! 🏆♠️ Wade is a long-time supporter of the Dakota Poker Tour, and tonight he claimed victory in a big way, battling through 63 players and taking down one stacked final table! This final table was truly a who’s who of championship titles, and when the last chips fell, Wade walked away with $4,700 and the first trophy of the 2026 season! 🔥 Final Table Payouts: 2nd – $2,960 Jamie Meidinger (Jamestown, ND) 3rd – $2,340 Kent Gronlie (Valley City, ND) 4th – $1,780 Basim Habib (Cottage Grove, WI) 5th – $1,360 Lindsey Hanson (Fargo, ND) 6th – $1,100 Travis Severson (Sanborn, ND) 7th – $900 Niles Short (Minnewauken, ND) 8th – $700 Joel Smith (Henning MN) 9th – $180 Tim Scott (Bubble) Thank you again to everyone who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and the Valley City Eagles Club — we appreciate each and every one of you! ❤️ Next Stop: Dead Money Open West Fargo, North Dakota We’ll see you next weekend! 🔥♠️ DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Jackson Your Operation Red, White & Bluff Champion! 🇺🇸♠️
articles.excerpt: 🎉 Congratulations Jackson — Your Operation Red, White & Bluff Champion! 🇺🇸♠️ What. A. Finish. 🔥 After an absolutely epic heads-up battle between Jackson and Kim Rasmussen, the chips finally swung Jackson’s way — and he closed it out like a…
articles.content: 🎉 Congratulations Jackson — Your Operation Red, White & Bluff Champion! 🇺🇸♠️ What. A. Finish. 🔥 After an absolutely epic heads-up battle between Jackson and Kim Rasmussen, the chips finally swung Jackson’s way — and he closed it out like a true champ! 💪🃏 Jackson is officially your Operation Red, White & Bluff Champion, taking home a well-earned $4,000 in cash… and marking his SECOND championship win here at the Casselton Vets Club! 👑💵 Kim Rasmussen put up an incredible fight and made the final duel one to remember — hats off to both players for a fantastic finish. ⚡️ Thank you to everyone who came out to support the Casselton Vets Club and the Dakota Poker Tour. 1st $4000 Jackson Sjkerseth Fargo ND 2nd $2400 Kim Rasmussen Forman ND 3rd $1900 Katy Fredrickson Carrington ND 4th $ 1500 Wade Kyser Erie ND 5th $1200 Joshua Jordan West Fargo 6th $1000Joel Klipping red Lake Falls, MN 7th $800Jon Wurden Fisher MN 8th $600 Julie Wadena Mahnomen, Mn DPT Leaderboard: dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel:youtube.com/@dakotapokertour #DakotaPokerTour #OperationPoker #RedWhiteAndBluff #Casselton #VeteransDay #PokerEvent #NorthDakotaPoker #HonoringHeroes

articles.title: 🎉 Congratulations Bruce Wheeler! 🎉
articles.excerpt: What a night at the Casselton Vets Club Friday Night Turbo! A huge shoutout to Bruce Wheeler of Casselton, ND, who battled through a field of 47 players and came out on top, taking home a well-earned $2,500! We’d also like to extend a heart…
articles.content: What a night at the Casselton Vets Club Friday Night Turbo! A huge shoutout to Bruce Wheeler of Casselton, ND, who battled through a field of 47 players and came out on top, taking home a well-earned $2,500! We’d also like to extend a heartfelt thank you to Bruce for his service as a retired veteran. Your dedication to our country and your support of the Casselton Vets Club mean so much to all of us. Thank you to everyone who came out tonight to support the Casselton Vets Club and the Dakota Poker Tour. And we’re not done yet… Join us tomorrow for Operation Red White & Bluff!

articles.content: What a night! A huge thank you to all 80 players who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and our charity partner L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc. Together, we generated an incredible $20,400 prize pool! 💰 It was a stacked final table filled with talent, competition, and great poker energy all night long: Paul Johnson – Fargo, ND David Vig – Fargo, ND Anthony Uhlir – Grand Forks, ND Sara Weiskar – Fargo, ND James Petriella – Grand Forks, ND Zach Braaten – West Fargo, ND Matt Jore – Grand Forks, ND Joel Klipping – Red Lake Falls, MN Ricky Kadlec – Grand Forks, ND And the stakes couldn’t be higher — tonight’s champion will take home $6,000 and the trophy! 🏆💵 Congratulations to everyone who made it deep — and thank you again for making this event such a success. 🙌 Check out the latest results and upcoming events below: DPT Leaderboard: dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT YouTube Channel: youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: 🔥 Get Ready for the L.I.S.T.E.N. INC. MONSTER STACK! 🔥
articles.excerpt: It’s one of the biggest events of the season – and it’s happening **TODAY!!** A full day of deep stacks, big blinds, and serious poker action awaits. 🗓️ Saturday, November 1, 2025 🕚 New Start Time: 11AM 💰 $300 Buy-In | One-Day Monster Stack…
articles.content: It’s one of the biggest events of the season – and it’s happening **TODAY!!** A full day of deep stacks, big blinds, and serious poker action awaits. 🗓️ Saturday, November 1, 2025 🕚 New Start Time: 11AM 💰 $300 Buy-In | One-Day Monster Stack Event 💵 100K Starting Stack | 30-Min Levels 🕕 Late Registration available until 6PM (after Dinner Break) Last year’s champion, **Eric Thompson of East Grand Forks, ND**, took home **$6,000** in the Monster Stack. Who will claim the title — and the big prize — this year? 🏆 Don’t miss your shot to join one of the most exciting poker events of the year! articles.content: 🏆 Congratulations, Joel Klipping! 🏆 Joel Klipping from Red Lake Falls, MN is making his presence known and kicking off the weekend in style! Back in March 2025, he claimed 2nd place, and in 2024, Joel was crowned the L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc. Champion, taking home $7,400. Tonight, Joel conquered the Friday Night Turbo, defeating 21 players to earn $1,500 and another 1st Place Victory! Final Results: 1st – Joel Klipping (Red Lake Falls, MN) – $1,500 2nd – Jason Senger (Devils Lake, ND) – $1,060 3rd – Jeremiah Alonge (Jamestown, ND) – $720 4th – Mike Marek (East Grand Forks, MN) – $540 Joel has been a longtime supporter and friend of the Dakota Poker Tour, and we’re thrilled to see his continued success at the tables. Thank you to everyone who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and our charity partner, L.I.S.T.E.N. Inc. Join us tomorrow for the SATURDAY – MONSTER STACK! November 1, 2025 New Start Time: 11AM $300 Buy-In | One-Day Monster Stack Event 100K Starting Stack | 30-Min Levels Late Registration available until 6PM (after Dinner Break) Don’t miss this monster day of poker action and your chance to grab a big stack and a bigger payout! articles.title: Mike Hlebechuk Poker Brat Champion at The Windbreak
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to Mike Hlebechuk of Fargo, ND, our Poker Brat Black Chip Bounty Champion at The Windbreak! Mike battled his way through a talented 46-player field to take home $2,100 plus $800 in bounties, defeating Tony Waltz heads-up in…
articles.content: Congratulations to Mike Hlebechuk of Fargo, ND, our Poker Brat Black Chip Bounty Champion at The Windbreak! Mike battled his way through a talented 46-player field to take home $2,100 plus $800 in bounties, defeating Tony Waltz heads-up in a bittersweet finish, fittingly, the very friend who first introduced him to poker! A longtime supporter and friend of the Dakota Poker Tour, Mike’s win tonight is a well-deserved triumph and another great moment in DPT history. Thank you to everyone who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and our charity partner, NPPA. It was incredible to see so many familiar faces and meet new players — we appreciate each and every one of you! This event brought together 46 players, generating an $11,700 prize pool and a great night of poker, sportsmanship, and community. 1st $2100 Mike Hlebechuk Fargo ND +$800 Bounty’s 2nd $1300 Tony Walz Fargo ND + $400 Bounty’s 3rd $100 Todd Egerdahl Fargo ND +$200 bounty’s 4th $800 Gary Ewald Park River ND + $800 bounty’s 5th $700 Matt Wolff Spicer MN + $400 bounty’s 6th $600 Alan Perry Aberdeen SD +$500 Bounty’s 7th $500 Jon Christian Casselton ND $100 bounty’s 8th Tim Walsh Dark Rapids MN 9th Josh Lanzdorf West Fargo ND $300 bounty’s

articles.content: The Dakota Poker Tour has rolled into The Windbreak for today’s Poker Brat Black Chip Bounty Tournament! Cards are in the air at 12:00 PM, with registration opening at 11:00 AM and late registration available until 5:00 PM — plenty of time to jump in and join the action! $200 Buy-In gets you 20K in starting chips, with a $100 add-on available for another 20K (must have chips in play to qualify). Come join the fun, grab some bounties, and see your name climb the DPT Leaderboard!

articles.title: Ali Novin Claims Victory at Dakota Magic
articles.excerpt: Tri-State Poker Championship: Ali Novin Wins Second Chance Event at Dakota Magic! The action was electric once again at Dakota Magic Casino & Hotel in Hankinson, ND, as the Dakota Poker Tour (DPT) and Roughrider Poker Tour (RPT) teamed up t…
articles.content: Tri-State Poker Championship: Ali Novin Wins Second Chance Event at Dakota Magic! The action was electric once again at Dakota Magic Casino & Hotel in Hankinson, ND, as the Dakota Poker Tour (DPT) and Roughrider Poker Tour (RPT) teamed up to present Event #47C — the Tri-State Poker Championship Second Chance Tournament on October 5, 2025. The $250 buy-in event drew 67 entries, building a $13,400 prize pool and capping off an incredible weekend of championship poker. In his first-ever appearance, Ali Novin made it one to remember, battling through a tough field and securing his first RPT/DPT title along with a $4,000 payday! Here’s how the final table finished: Ali Novin – $4,000 Cordell Schroeder – $2,700 Robert “Muzz” Anderson – $2,000 Carl Wallin – $1,400 Lindsey Hansen – $1,000 David Highley – $710 Patrick Wingard – $620 Natalia Zinn – $520 Jon Wurden – $450 The DPT x RPT Tri-State Poker Championship weekend was a massive success, featuring three days of high-level play, strong turnouts, and unforgettable finishes. Congratulations to all the players who made the trip and helped make this debut stop one to remember!

articles.title: Congratulations Tri-State Poker Championship Winner Bridget Johnson
articles.excerpt: Tri-State Poker Championship has officially crowned its champion, Bridget Johnson of Dickinson, ND outlasted a talented field of 351 entries to capture her career-best payday of $35,000, the custom trophy, and a coveted $1,000 Dream Chaser…
articles.content: Tri-State Poker Championship has officially crowned its champion, Bridget Johnson of Dickinson, ND outlasted a talented field of 351 entries to capture her career-best payday of $35,000, the custom trophy, and a coveted $1,000 Dream Chaser V Main Event seat. The $650 buy-in event, co-hosted by the Roughrider Poker Tour (RPT) and the Dakota Poker Tour (DPT), generated a massive $189,540 prize pool and showcased some of the best poker talent in the region. Johnson sealed the deal after a quick heads-up battle with Mark Fink, who finished runner-up for $20,000. Here’s how the Final Table finished: Bridget Johnson – Dickinson, ND – $35,000 Mark Fink – Sioux Falls, SD – $20,000 Keith Kemper – Casselton, ND – $15,000 Paul Johnson – Fargo, ND – $10,700 Kim Rasmussen – Forman, ND – $9,000 Cody Slusher – Kindred, ND – $7,700 Chad Knoblauch – Grand Forks, ND – $6,600 James Girouard – Sioux Falls, SD – $5,500 Dustin Benda – Wahpeton, ND – $4,400 A huge thank you to everyone who came out to play, to FPN Gaming for powering the live stream, and to Jerod and Goose for their incredible production work. And of course, a big shoutout to our dealers and staff for keeping the action running smoothly all weekend long. Check out the pokernews article & interview with our inaugural Tri-State Poker CHAMPION, Bridget Johnson!

articles.title: 🎉 Congratulations to the 52 Finalists Advancing to Championship Sunday! 🎉
articles.excerpt: After two exciting starting flights and a total of 351 entries, the field has been narrowed to just 52 players who will return for Day 2 of the RPT Tri-State Poker Championship at Dakota Magic Hotel & Casino! Each of these players has alrea…
articles.content: After two exciting starting flights and a total of 351 entries, the field has been narrowed to just 52 players who will return for Day 2 of the RPT Tri-State Poker Championship at Dakota Magic Hotel & Casino! Each of these players has already secured a payout, but the big goal remains, capturing the $35,000 first-place prize, the trophy, and the title of Tri-State Poker Champion! The stage is set for an unforgettable Championship Sunday. Leading the way is Jamie Meidinger with a commanding 1,427,000 in chips, followed by Eric Hanson with 1,260,000, and Heidi Roggenkamp close behind at 1,126,000. The rest of the field is stacked with talent and determination — it’s anyone’s game! A huge thank you from the Dakota Poker Tour (DPT) and Roughrider Poker Tour (RPT) to everyone for their continued support! Special thanks to FPN Gaming for providing the Live Stream, and to Jerod and Goose for their awesome production work behind the scenes. 🎥 And of course, a big shoutout to our dealers and staff — your hard work and dedication make these championship events possible! 🙌 Best of luck to all 52 returning players as they battle it out for glory on Championship Sunday! 🏆 Prize Pool Overview – 1st – $35,000 2nd – $20,000 3rd – $15,000 4th – $10,700 5th – $9,000 6th – $7,700 7th – $6,600 8th – $5,500 9th – $4,400 10th – $3,315 …and payouts continuing through 52nd place! Jamie Meidinger – 1,427,000 Eric Hanson – 1,260,000 Heidi Roggenkamp – 1,126,000 Mark Fink – 928,000 Craig Pohlmann – 797,000 Keith Kemper – 769,000 Kim Rasmussen – 758,000 Corey Littlewolf – 727,000 Gary Ewald – 724,000 Arlie Brandvold – 645,000 Joshua Matti – 613,000 Anthony Uhlir – 602,000 Samuel Johnson – 587,000 Chad Knoblauch – 561,000 Cody Billadeau – 553,000 Tyler Kolness – 523,000 Bridget Johnson – 475,000 Robert Urbatsch – 474,000 Jeremy Thury – 461,000 Samuel Faleide – 409,000 Jon Wurden – 383,000 Skyler Sand – 361,000 Ernest Trzpuc – 344,000 Josh Unruh – 316,000 Steve Belland – 311,000 Chad Ransom – 280,000 Eric Hjelmstad – 279,000 Jason Kramer – 277,000 Matthew Wetsch – 265,000 James Girouard – 258,000 Dustin Benda – 254,000 Weston Wells – 238,000 Daniel Tennefos – 225,000 Chastity Askvig – 221,000 Cody Slusher – 195,000 Paul Johnson – 193,000 Chad Fowler – 192,000 Eli Egli – 154,000 Justin Carlson – 152,000 Hahn Kupfer – 147,000 David Chaput – 134,000 Timothy Arens – 129,000 Robert Anderson – 122,000 Les Haagenson – 116,000 Jeremy Holmes – 110,000 Timothy Scott – 106,000 Cary Long – 100,000 Cody Krause – 100,000 Erik Nordeng – 56,000 Timothy Scott – 40,000 Reid Johnson – 17,000

articles.title: Flight B Wraps at the RPT Tri-State Poker Championship!
articles.excerpt: Action has come to an end for Flight B of the RPT Tri-State Poker Championship at Dakota Magic Hotel & Casino , following 16 intense levels of play. From a field of 188 entries , just 27 players survived the night, each already in the money…
articles.content: Action has come to an end for Flight B of the RPT Tri-State Poker Championship at Dakota Magic Hotel & Casino , following 16 intense levels of play. From a field of 188 entries , just 27 players survived the night, each already in the money and locked into Sunday’s Championship Day . They’ll be joining the 25 qualifiers from Day 1A , bringing the total field returning Sunday to 52 players — all eyeing the trophy, the title, and the $35,000 top prize ! 💰 Leading the charge is Jamie Meidinger , who dominated play from start to finish, bagging a massive 1,427,000 to take the overall chip lead into Championship Day. The North Dakota standout continues a stellar run, fresh off his victory at the RPT South Dakota State Poker Championship , where he earned over $90,000 earlier this year. 💵 Payout Breakdown 🏆 Top Payouts: 1st – $35,000 2nd – $20,000 3rd – $15,000 4th – $10,700 5th – $9,000 6th – $7,700 7th – $6,600 8th – $5,500 9th – $4,400 10th – $3,315 💰 Additional Cashes: 11th–12th – $2,800 13th–15th – $2,500 16th–18th – $2,200 19th–21st – $2,050 22nd–24th – $1,925 25th–27th – $1,800 28th–36th – $1,500 37th–45th – $1,200 46th–52nd – $1,000 🔥 The stage is set for an action-packed Championship Sunday , where the final 52 contenders will battle for glory, prestige, and their share of the prize pool!

articles.title: 25 Players Advance to Day 2 of the Tri-State Poker Championship
articles.excerpt: Eric Hanson from dominated the opening flight, bagging a towering stack of 1,260,000. He built momentum throughout the session and seized control of the leaderboard in the closing stretch. Hanson stands alone as the only player to top the m…
articles.content: Eric Hanson from dominated the opening flight, bagging a towering stack of 1,260,000. He built momentum throughout the session and seized control of the leaderboard in the closing stretch. Hanson stands alone as the only player to top the million mark and will head into Championship Sunday armed with more than 100 big blinds. In second position is Craig Pohlmann (797,000), who vaulted up the counts after a dramatic bubble hand. Pohlmann connected with the stone-cold nuts against Carl Derry’s flopped set, a clash that sent Derry tumbling to the short stack before bowing out as the bubble finisher. Not far behind sits Gary Ewald (724,000). Ewald surged late in the evening, winning a critical race when his pocket jacks prevailed over Joseph Osterbauer Sr.’s ace-king. From there, he held steady to secure a top-three stack heading into Day 2. Day 1 final Chip Counts: Eric Hanson 1,260,000 Craig Pohlmann 797,000 Gary Ewald 724,000 Arlie Brandvold 645,000 Anthony Uhlir 602,000 Samuel Johnson 587,000 Chad Knoblauch 561,000 Robert Urbatsch 474,000 Jeremy Thury 461,000 Samuel Faleide 409,000 Jon Wurden 383,000 Skyler Sand 361,000 Ernest Trzpuc 344,000 Chad Ransom 280,000 Jason Kramer 277,000 Matthew Wetsch 265,000 James Girouard 258,000 Weston Wells 238,000 Cody Slusher 195,000 Paul Johnson 193,000 Eli Egli 154,000 Les Haagenson 116,000 Jeremy Holmes 110,000 Cody Billadeau 75,000 Mark Dufner 63,000

articles.title: Congratulations to the City Brew Champion Mike Columbus
articles.excerpt: Mike Columbus of Red Lake Falls, MN takes home $4,000 and DPT Trophy, triumphing over Josh Matti Dillworth, MN in a fierce heads-up battle! Thank you to everyone who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and our charity partner, the Hea…
articles.content: Mike Columbus of Red Lake Falls, MN takes home $4,000 and DPT Trophy, triumphing over Josh Matti Dillworth, MN in a fierce heads-up battle! Thank you to everyone who came out to support the Dakota Poker Tour and our charity partner, the Head of the Red Youth Activities. It was amazing to see familiar faces and to welcome new friends to the tables—we truly appreciate each and every one of you! Next up: Join us at Haggie’s in Mapleton, ND, next weekend for the 100K Monster Stack! DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT Youtube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour 1st $4000 Mike Columbus Red Lake Falls, MN 2nd $2700 Josh Matti Dilworth, MN 3rd $2100 Joel Klipping Red Lake Falls MN 4th $1600 Sam Johnson Wahpeton ND 5th $1200 Craig Evenson Argsville ND 6th $1000 Tony Uhlir Grand Forks ND 7th $830 Steve Belland Bemidji MN 8th $700 Brian Watson Wahpeton ND

articles.title: Thank you, players, registration closed at the City Brew Hall
articles.excerpt: A huge thank you to everyone who came out today to support the Dakota Poker Tour and our charity partner, the Head of the Red Youth Activities! 📝 Registration closed with 54 players and 153 add-ons/rebuys, building an incredible $15,700 pri…
articles.content: A huge thank you to everyone who came out today to support the Dakota Poker Tour and our charity partner, the Head of the Red Youth Activities! 📝 Registration closed with 54 players and 153 add-ons/rebuys, building an incredible $15,700 prize pool! 💵 🏆 Tonight, 8 players will be taking home cash—good luck to everyone still in the hunt! 👏 Special thanks to the familiar faces who continue to support us and a warm welcome to the new players who joined the action today—we’re glad to have you as part of the DPT family! DPT Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard DPT Calendar: https://dakotapokertour.com/calendar DPT Youtube Channel: https://youtube.com/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: Wahpeton Poker Event – 5 Tables Running, Registration Open Till 5PM!
articles.excerpt: Cards are in the air now at City Brew Hall in Wahpeton, ND! We’re starting with 5 tables of action, and late registration is open until 5 PM. Buy-in: $150 = 20K in chips Add 10K more for every extra $50 (up to a $300 max buy-in for a 50K st…
articles.content: Cards are in the air now at City Brew Hall in Wahpeton, ND! We’re starting with 5 tables of action, and late registration is open until 5 PM. Buy-in: $150 = 20K in chips Add 10K more for every extra $50 (up to a $300 max buy-in for a 50K starting stack) Dinner break special: Taco Bar for just $10 Watch some college ball, stay dry from the rainy weather, and hang out with your friends while playing great poker! Last year we had 91 players—let’s beat that record today! We’re proud to support the Head of the Red Youth Activities Foundation, keeping the state minimum 10% and giving maximum prize pool back to our players! Don’t miss out—plenty of action still ahead!

articles.content: Who’s joining us today at City Brew Hall in Wahpeton, ND for this one-day event? 🃏 Cards in the air: 12:00 PM ⏱️ Blinds: 30 minutes 💵 Buy-in: $150 = 20K in chips ➕ Add 10K more for every extra $50 (up to a $300 max buy-in for a 50K starting stack) 🕓 Late registration: open until 5 PM 🌮 Dinner break special: Taco Bar for just $10 🏈 Watch the Bison game, stay dry from the rainy weather, and hang out with your friends while playing some great poker! Last year we had 91 players—let’s beat that record today! 🔥 We’re proud to support the Head of the Red Youth Activities Foundation, keeping the state minimum 10% and giving maximum prize pool back to our players! Don’t miss it—see you on the felt! 🃏

articles.title: Cards are in the air at the Poker Brat Black Chip Bounty

articles.content: Cards are in the air at The Poker Brat at the Windbreak Black Chip Bounty Tournament?! 7 tables with late registration available until 5pm. $200 Buy-In gets you a 20K starting stack $100 Add-On available for an extra 20K chips (must have chips in play to be eligible) 30-minute blind levels Suggested Dealer Appreciation: $20 ELIMINATE a player, EARN $100! articles.title: Urbatsch Goes All In and Takes It Down!
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to Robert Urbatsch for taking down the Casselton Vets Deep Stack Event ! Robert played like a true champion, outlasting a tough field of 44 players to claim $3,000 in cash , the championship trophy , and of course — ultimate…
articles.content: Congratulations to Robert Urbatsch for taking down the Casselton Vets Deep Stack Event ! Robert played like a true champion, outlasting a tough field of 44 players to claim $3,000 in cash , the championship trophy , and of course — ultimate bragging rights ! A big THANK YOU to all the players who came out to support not only the Dakota Poker Tour , but also today's incredible charity — the Casselton Vets Club . Your continued support means the world, and we’re proud to keep the cards flying for great causes. 2nd $1900 Calvin Riggs West Fargo ND 3rd $1500 Eugene Smith Litchville ND 4th $1200 Donald Drummond Fargo ND 5th $900 Nick Boyum Mahnomen MN 6th $800 Anthony Uhlir Grand Forks ND 7th$700 Jason Kramer West Fargo ND

articles.title: $20K prize pool and climbing!
articles.excerpt: What’s that?! A $20K prize pool and climbing! Plenty of time to join the action — late registration open until 9:30 PM! Bag chips 11:30 PM and come back on Day Two: Sunday at 12 PM. $300 buy-in gets you a 100K starting stack with 40-minute…
articles.content: What’s that?! A $20K prize pool and climbing! Plenty of time to join the action — late registration open until 9:30 PM! Bag chips 11:30 PM and come back on Day Two: Sunday at 12 PM. $300 buy-in gets you a 100K starting stack with 40-minute blinds Huge shoutout to West Fargo Rule Fire Department — holding the state 10% minimum, giving maximum love back to the poker community. Don’t miss the official livestream — catch all the action starting at 7 PM on YouTube!

articles.title: Cards are in the air and chips are flying at Hagge’s in Mapelton ND.
articles.excerpt: We’ve got 8 tables packed with poker faces (and a few questionable bluffs), and we’ve got room for more— Late registration open ‘til 9:30PM. $300 buy-in gets you 100K in chips and 40-minute blinds. It’s all for a great cause: the West Fargo…
articles.content: We’ve got 8 tables packed with poker faces (and a few questionable bluffs), and we’ve got room for more— Late registration open ‘til 9:30PM. $300 buy-in gets you 100K in chips and 40-minute blinds. It’s all for a great cause: the West Fargo Rural Fire Department is keeping the state minimum 10% and giving the MAXIMUM back to the prize pool. So your bad beat just might help buy a fire hose. This is an official live stream event, you can find all the action after 7pm on YouTube/@dakotapokertour

articles.title: The Dakota Poker Tour has officially arrived at Hagge’s Bar in Mapelton North Dakota
articles.excerpt: It’s time to shuffle up and deal, the Spring Championship is HERE The only thing hotter than the action at Hagge’s today is someone slow-rolling with pocket aces. Cards are in the air at 12PM. Late registration open until 9:30PM. $300 buy-i…
articles.content: It’s time to shuffle up and deal, the Spring Championship is HERE The only thing hotter than the action at Hagge’s today is someone slow-rolling with pocket aces. Cards are in the air at 12PM. Late registration open until 9:30PM. $300 buy-in, 100k stack, 40-minute blinds — it’s like they want you to play like a legend. That’s right, folks—this is a freezeout. One shot. One stack. One dream. OFFICIAL LIVE STREAM EVENT!— yes, your questionable all-ins can now be judged in real time on YouTube by the internet and your grandma. Every bluff deserves an audience.— come for the poker, stay for the chaos.

articles.title: Cards are in the air at the Cactus Jack’s Open here in Fargo, ND!
articles.excerpt: Cards are in the air at the Cactus Jack’s Open here in Fargo, ND! We’ve got 5 tables running and room to grow—late registration is open until 8:20 PM tonight! Buy-in is just $100 for 15K in tournament chips, with rebuys and add-ons availabl…
articles.content: Cards are in the air at the Cactus Jack’s Open here in Fargo, ND! We’ve got 5 tables running and room to grow—late registration is open until 8:20 PM tonight! Buy-in is just $100 for 15K in tournament chips, with rebuys and add-ons available to keep the action going. Thank you to our host, Plains Art Museum, who’s keeping it real with the state minimum 10%—which means more money back to our players! Don’t miss the feature table, which will be live-streamed tomorrow—come out, play some cards, and be part of the action!

Buy-ins are $150 for a 20k starting stack or $300 for a 50k starting stack. It’s a great chance to play some poker while supporting the Hole in One Foundation. The winner will earn the Trophy, hat, and CASH — last year’s champ took home $6,800 and it looks like we will beat that today!

articles.title: Dream Chaser III CHAMPION $35,000 Caden Coleman
articles.excerpt: Caden Coleman does it again! Just over 24 hours removed from his championship performance in the $375 Monster Stack for a $13,000 win, Caden Coleman pulls off the ultimate SUN RUN! Caden started the Dream Chaser III final table as massive c…
articles.content: Caden Coleman does it again! Just over 24 hours removed from his championship performance in the $375 Monster Stack for a $13,000 win, Caden Coleman pulls off the ultimate SUN RUN! Caden started the Dream Chaser III final table as massive chip leader and goes coast to coast, setting himself a new high score of $35,000! Incredible weekend, Caden! Caden also locks up the $5,000 Player of the Series BONUS to cap off one of the most impressive weekends in RPT tour history! Huge thanks to everybody who came out this weekend as we absolutely CRUSHED another Dream Chaser event at Spirit Lake Casino, with 160 entries and a total prize pool of $140,000

articles.title: Mike Schultz Operation Red White and Bluff Champion
articles.excerpt: Congratulations Mike Schultz! The Operation Poker: Red White and Bluff - Honoring Heroes for Veterans Day at the Casselton Vets Club Inc. Tournament Champion! It couldn’t be more fitting that Mike, a veteran himself, took home the win at th…
articles.content: Congratulations Mike Schultz! The Operation Poker: Red White and Bluff - Honoring Heroes for Veterans Day at the Casselton Vets Club Inc. Tournament Champion! It couldn’t be more fitting that Mike, a veteran himself, took home the win at this special event! 🇺🇸 It was amazing to see so many veterans come out and support the cause— We cant thank you enough for your service and sacrifice. At the final table, Mike and Wade were heads-up, each with an even stack of chips. They made a deal for the prize money but still battled it out for another 45 minutes for the trophy and the coveted seat in the Tournament of Champions. A huge thank you to everyone who came out to support the Casselton Vets Club and the Dakota Poker Tour! Your presence truly made this event a success, and we couldn’t be more grateful for your ongoing support of our veterans and their families. 2nd $3850 Wade Kyser Erie ND 3rd $2100 Jeremy Heinze Lisbon ND 4th $1600 Becky Hanson Lisbon ND 5th $1300 Bruce Kulseth 6th $1100 Mike Columbus Red Lake Falls MN 7th $900 Bruce Wheeler Casselton ND 8th $700 Tanner Larson Fargo ND 9th $600 Craig Thompson West Fargo ND

articles.title: Hagge's Fall Classic Kicks off Fall Schedule
articles.excerpt: The 2023-2024 poker season is heating up as the Dakota Poker Tour (DPT) teams up with the Roughrider Poker Tour (RPT) for Hagges Fall Classic this weekend in Mapleton, ND. This event has generated a $7,000+ 1st place cash the last 2 years,…
articles.content: The 2023-2024 poker season is heating up as the Dakota Poker Tour (DPT) teams up with the Roughrider Poker Tour (RPT) for Hagges Fall Classic this weekend in Mapleton, ND. This event has generated a $7,000+ 1st place cash the last 2 years, and we expect that to climb with the charity taking the state-minimum 10% from the prize pool. Thank you WFRFD :) DPT current season points leader is Brad Pausch from Wahpeton, ND, with Duane Anderson and Joel Klipping on his heels. This event will count for points on both the Dakota Poker Tour and Roughrider Poker Tour leaderboards. Expect to see lots of familiar faces and some new faces too! DPT Current Leaderboard Standings: Brad Pausch- 20617 points Duane Anderson - 14900 points Joel Klipping - 11750 points Brett Leben - 11547 points Anthoney Uhlir 11438 points Rough Rider Current Leaderboard standings: Arlie Brandvold 961.9 Points Zach Byers 681.3 Points Robert Urbatsch 654.2 Greg Passa 644.35 Richard Perkerewicz 500.82

articles.title: James Wilson Wins in Oakes $6,750
articles.excerpt: Congrats to James Wilson from Wahpeton ND for capturing the Hole In One Foundation tournament in Oakes, ND for $6,750. It was a fun final table that had plenty of big hand drama. Steve Belland was runner up for $4,000 and Cody Slusher took…
articles.content: Congrats to James Wilson from Wahpeton ND for capturing the Hole In One Foundation tournament in Oakes, ND for $6,750. It was a fun final table that had plenty of big hand drama. Steve Belland was runner up for $4,000 and Cody Slusher took 3rd for $3,000. Here are the players who cashed: 1st $6750 James Wilson Wahpeton ND 2nd $4000 Steve Belland Bagley MN 3rd $3000 Cody Slusher Oakes ND 4th $2000 Shawn Pettigrew Grand Forks N 5th $1700 Robin Green Groton SD 6th $1400 Cody Nash Oakes ND 7th $1100 Grayson Roney Oakes ND 8th $ 900 Jason Miller Detroit Lakes MN 9th $700 Bob Miller Oakes ND 10th $600 John Waliser Lisbon ND Click here for complete results . Big thanks to everyone for coming out, next up is Pour Decisions in Tioga Saturday March 9th.

articles.title: Arlie Brandvold Watford City Eagles Champion
articles.excerpt: Event 10 02-24-2024 Watford City Eagles Club, Watford City ND WINNER $6,500 Arlie Brandvold! After the dust settled on a record shattering day in Wild Wild Watford, we finished with 105 unique players, 201 total entries, and a massive prize…
articles.content: Event 10 02-24-2024 Watford City Eagles Club, Watford City ND WINNER $6,500 Arlie Brandvold! After the dust settled on a record shattering day in Wild Wild Watford, we finished with 105 unique players, 201 total entries, and a massive prize pool of $24,120! Current Player of the Year points leader and 2022 RPT Player of the Year, Arlie Brandvold plays it to perfection as he becomes the first of 2 DPT/RPT trophy winning players on this epic weekend! See you Sunday at Phat Fish Brewing in Dickinson at NOON! Late entry, re-entry and add-ons available until 5:30 pm. 201 entries $24,120 prize pool 1st Arlie Brandvold $6,500 2nd Garrick Baatrup $4,100 3rd Mike Salveson $3,150 4th Kostner Benz-Weber $2,220 5th Vanessa Christensen $1,700 6th Jeremy Hausauer $1,100 7th Dave Ouellette $970 8th Seth Hilleren $850 9th Nick Hammarstrom $710 10th Greg Johnson $600 11th Lori Hausauer $600 12th Shae Johnson $540 13th Ray Frank $540 14th Carol Bohlman $540

articles.title: New Season Begins Soon!
articles.excerpt: The summer break for the DPT is coming to end soon! We're looking forward the official kickoff of the DPT 2023-2024 Season with the RPT Summer Main event with the Roughrider Poker Tour at the Bismarck Hotel Aug 25-27th. Stay tuned for updat…
articles.content: The summer break for the DPT is coming to end soon! We're looking forward the official kickoff of the DPT 2023-2024 Season with the RPT Summer Main event with the Roughrider Poker Tour at the Bismarck Hotel Aug 25-27th. Stay tuned for updates in the near future as we finalize the Fall schedule, including some exciting new events! Aug 25-27th RPT Summer Main Event - Bismarck Hotel Sept 16th Hagge's Deep Stack Oct 8th Mandan Eagles Club Mega Stack Oct 15th Poker Brat Bounty Tournament - Windbreak

articles.title: Over $5,500 in prizes up for grabs today!
articles.excerpt: Today! Over $5,500 in prizes are up for grabs in our Season ending BONUS FREEROLLS! Plus seats in FPN's Vegas 100K World Championship Main Event at the Golden Nugget in Las Vegas Jan 4-7th 2024. TOURNAMENT OF CHAMPIONS (TOC) - Noon 1st Plac…
articles.content: Today! Over $5,500 in prizes are up for grabs in our Season ending BONUS FREEROLLS! Plus seats in FPN's Vegas 100K World Championship Main Event at the Golden Nugget in Las Vegas Jan 4-7th 2024. TOURNAMENT OF CHAMPIONS (TOC) - Noon 1st Place - $1,500 Poker Package + FPN 100k Seat 2nd Place - $300 DPT Certificate 3rd Place - $150 DPT Certificate Starting Chips 100k Individual Champions from Season 2022-2023 are invited to this event. Points: 2x Prizes plus participation (100) PLAYER APPRECIATION FREEROLL (PAF) - 230pm 1st Place - $1,500 Poker Package + FPN 100k Seat 2nd Place - $300 DPT Certificate 3rd Place - $150 DPT Certificate Starting Chips 10k/15k/20k (based on POY rank) All players who participated in at least one (1) Dakota Poker Tour event in Season 2022-2023 are invited to today's Player Appreciation Freeroll. Points: 2x Points (FPN Points System + Value of Prize) plus participation (100) PLAYER OF THE YEAR (POY) 1st Place - $1,500 Poker Package + FPN 100k Seat Based on final POY ranking after today's events and official review Pre-Register for today's tournaments: https://dakotapokertour.com Current Leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard Can Brad Pausch hang on to lock in Player of the Year status?! BIG THANKS to everyone who participated this season in DPT and RPT events this year!

articles.title: Dick Gerdes Bounty Champ $5,580
articles.excerpt: Dick Gerdes took down Sunday's Black-Chip Bounty Tournament over DPT Championship weekend, earning $4,380 for first place in addition to $1,200 in bounty knockouts for a total win of $5,580. Congratulations to Donald Drummond for placing ru…
articles.content: Dick Gerdes took down Sunday's Black-Chip Bounty Tournament over DPT Championship weekend, earning $4,380 for first place in addition to $1,200 in bounty knockouts for a total win of $5,580. Congratulations to Donald Drummond for placing runner up and the rest of the final table players that cashed. Dirk Gerdes $5,580 Donald Drummond $3,270 Rob Urbatsch $2,460 Michael Hlehechuk $1,770 Nick Boyum $1,400 Arlie Brandvold $1,380 Basim Habib $1,400 Weston Wells $1,020 David Beadle $880 DPT Championship weekend was a huge success with over $72,000 in cash prizes paid out, big thanks to Rough Rider Poker Tour for teaming up on this event. Also, big thank you to the West Fargo Volunteer Fire Dept and the Speedway Event Center for hosting this event. We look forward to the Season ending Bonus Freerolls on Sunday May 7th for the final opportunity for players to earn points towards Player of the Year status. Brad Pausch leads the way wtih Awesome Basim, Mark Dufner, Joel Klipping, and Rob Urbatsch rounding out the Top 5 currently.

articles.title: Cordell Schroeder from Carrington Wins Buffalo City Showdown $4,220
articles.excerpt: Congratulations Cordell Schroeder from Carrington! Cordell takes home the Trophy and $4,220 for 1st Place in the Buffalo City Showdown at the Buff Bar in Jamestown. Cordell also earns a seat in the Tournament of Champions Bonus $1500 WSOP P…
articles.content: Congratulations Cordell Schroeder from Carrington! Cordell takes home the Trophy and $4,220 for 1st Place in the Buffalo City Showdown at the Buff Bar in Jamestown. Cordell also earns a seat in the Tournament of Champions Bonus $1500 WSOP Package Freeroll coming up Sunday May 7th in West Fargo. The 2022-2023 Season of the Dakota Poker Tour wraps up next weekend with 3 BIG events at the Speedway Event Center in West Fargo. Player of the Year race is heating up! Here is the updated leaderboard: https://dakotapokertour.com/leaderboard Congratulations to the players that cashed today.
